65.reason: [Attempting to access members of a NULL pointer 'p' in the else block. When p is NULL, p->num and p->depth are invalid, leading to undefined behavior (likely crash). Also, the logic for printing leaf nodes is incorrect: it should only print when both children are NULL, not when p itself is NULL.]
